text.title: rag-eval-pipeline Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for rag-eval-pipeline application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a full baseline evaluation needed (PR / launch / weekly batch)?

branch.conclusion: Run full eval with retrieval + generation; gate merge.
Run sampled batch (10-20%) and append to longitudinal report.
Skip; rely on lightweight per-query monitoring.

example.description: A reranker change PR requires the full eval before merge.
